overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a futuristic flying car hovering along a rooftop platform at night. The camera smoothly orbits around the vehicle while the neon-lit city skyline, dominated by twin skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, fills the background. A 'FLIGHT CONTROL DISENGAGED' notification appears briefly, and the scene maintains a dark, atmospheric cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy use of neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop platform overlooking neon cityscape

events.description: on-screen text 'FLIGHT CONTROL DISENGAGED' appears in the upper left corner indicating vehicle mode change

agents.ego_description: piloting a futuristic hovering vehicle slowly forward along a rooftop platform with neon city skyline ahead

entered.detail: futuristic convertible hover vehicle with glowing red taillights and white body panels
tallest skyscraper covered in vertical holographic advertisements and neon signage with Asian characters
second tall skyscraper with illuminated signage running vertically along the facade
flat concrete rooftop surface with subtle edge markings and atmospheric haze
tropical palm trees visible on the edges of the rooftop platform

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a rear view of a futuristic flying car hovering steadily along a concrete rooftop platform at night. The twin neon-lit megatowers dominate the skyline ahead, covered in holographic advertisements. At approximately 10.5 seconds, a 'FLIGHT CONTROL DISENGAGED' notification appears on screen, indicating a change in the vehicle's flight systems.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop platform with side view of city

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the hover vehicle forward while the camera orbits to the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera smoothly orbits counter-clockwise around the vehicle, shifting from a rear view to a left-side view. The flying car now occupies the right side of the frame, revealing its sleek side profile and the detailed neon cityscape stretching into the hazy distance. The vehicle maintains a steady slow forward motion along the rooftop edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop platform with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: maintaining slow forward hover as the camera completes its orbit toward the rear-right of the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its orbital path around the vehicle, moving from the left side toward the rear-right. The flying car shifts to the left side of the frame, offering a view of its right side and rear. The neon megatowers remain prominent in the background as the vehicle continues its slow traverse along the rooftop platform, maintaining the atmospheric cyberpunk cityscape backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement around a futuristic flying car as it hovers along a concrete rooftop against a neon-lit skyline. It begins with a rear view of the vehicle facing twin megatowers covered in holographic advertisements, just as a flight control disengaged notification appears on screen. As the camera smoothly orbits counter-clockwise, the perspective shifts to the left side of the car, revealing its sleek profile while the detailed cityscape stretches into the hazy distance. The movement then continues its arc toward the rear-right, shifting the vehicle to the left side of the frame to showcase its right flank. Finally, the camera settles into a view of the car's rear and side as it maintains a slow forward traverse along the rooftop platform under the glow of the atmospheric cyberpunk backdrop.
